case_title: MAHIDA, I.C. vs. CURTIS, PERRY et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CURTIS, PERRY

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAHIDA, I.C. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURTIS, PERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 373 ELLIS STREET,#105, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-09-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
